title: Dye Batch #88 (Crimson Red)
description: Apply crimson red dye to 50kg of raw wool. Ensure color consistency across all batches.

title: Weave Pattern A
description: Follow the Persian silk pattern for the main border. Density should be 400 knots per square inch.

title: Quality Check - Order #442
description: Final inspection for order #442. Check for loose threads and color bleeding in the fringe area.

title: Trim Edges (Persian Model)
description: Precision trimming of the outer edges for the 8x10 Persian rug. Use specialized wool shears.

title: Rug Steam Cleaning
description: Deep steam cleaning for the antique collection. Temperature must not exceed 60 degrees.

title: Fringe Attachment
description: Attach silk fringes to the Kashmiri wool rug. Use double-needle stitching.
